title: Add schemas for package-local planning artifacts
goal: Implement #509 by adding explicit schemas for package-local planning classification artifacts.
Validate payload-surface classification and extraction-candidates JSON in package tests.
Update structured-file inventory so these artifacts are no longer freeform-prohibited gaps.
non_goals: Do not ship maintainer-only classification artifacts to host repos.
Do not turn package-local classification artifacts into ordinary startup input.
Do not replace existing package-boundary tests that check semantic coverage.
Do not broaden into executable inventory-claim validation; #544 owns that follow-up.

intent.outcome: package-local classification and extraction JSON artifacts have explicit schemas and are validated by package tests
intent.constraints: repo/tool/language agnostic; package-local only; no new first-line surfaces; keep #502 open for #544
intent.latitude: may add package-local schema files, package tests, inventory updates, and focused docs comments if needed
intent.escalation: stop if validation requires changing package payload semantics or shipping maintainer-only artifacts

execution.next_step: archive #509 and continue #544 unless refreshed evidence reprioritizes the lane

invariants: classification artifacts remain package-local maintainer/development inputs
schemas validate shape while existing tests keep semantic coverage
inventory must not route these files to #509 after completion

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: all machine-readable files are schema-backed, typed-validator-backed, generated/derived, or explicitly classified diagnostics

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #509 closes, continue #544 or refreshed higher-priority issue

iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: structured inventory schema_or_validator claims remain metadata-only unless executable validation checks them; this is already routed to #544
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: package-local schema validation, package packaging tests, inventory tests/checks, contract tooling checks, ruff, planning doctor, and planning-surface checks passed
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: #544 should make inventory schema/validator claims executable

intent_interpretation.literal request: Continue backlog lane-by-lane while dogfooding the package and creating issues for actionable improvement signals.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: remove package-local freeform JSON gaps without adding host-repo residue
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: schemas and package tests for payload-surface-classification and extraction-candidates
intent_interpretation.review guidance: verify the artifacts remain package-local and not shipped as target-repo operation surfaces

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Complete the bounded #509 slice with explicit schemas and tests for package-local planning classification artifacts.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep artifacts package-local and maintainer/development only; do not add host-repo startup or shipped payload burden.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Schema strictness, helper placement, focused test names, and inventory wording.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The slice cannot be proven without changing package payload semantics or shipping maintainer-only artifacts.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: package-local schemas/tests/artifacts, structured-file inventory/tests, active plan/state
execution_bounds.max changed files: about 10 unless proof reveals a narrow additional owner
execution_bounds.required validation commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py --strict; uv run ruff check packages/planning/tests tests src/agentic_workspace/contracts
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: before moving artifacts or changing package payload semantics
execution_bounds.stop before touching: host-repo installed payload shape or new startup/report surfaces

stop_conditions.stop when: schema validation would force changing existing package classification semantics
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: package-local artifacts must become shipped payload to prove the slice
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: changes spill into optional extension extraction decisions
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: existing tests show schema is too strict for maintained artifact shape

execution_run.what happened: Added explicit package-local schemas for payload-surface-classification.json and extraction-candidates.json; updated package tests to validate both records before semantic assertions; updated structured-file inventory and tests so both artifacts are schema-backed rather than routed freeform gaps.
execution_run.scope touched: package-local planning schemas/tests plus root structured-file inventory/tests and active planning state
execution_run.validations run: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check packages/planning/tests tests src/agentic_workspace/contracts; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <slice paths> --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/contracts scripts/check tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py
execution_run.result for continuation: #509 is complete; #544 remains under #502 for executable validation of structured inventory schema/validator claims.
execution_run.next step: archive this plan, commit/push, close #509, refresh evidence, then continue #544 or the refreshed top priority
